description: Move backgroundIndexer.js to src/features/indexing/. The file currently throws at module load with Cannot find module './sonicClient.js' — references three siblings that were stripped from lib/commands during an earlier cleanup (sonicClient.js, multiPassAnalyzer.js, precisionCapture.js, all originally from maestro-scaffolder-tool). The verify step is expected to report WARN — both old and new throw identically. The 5 other relative requires (databasePersister, dataIngestion, parserPersistence, insightStore, integr8/types) will rewrite cleanly via history. Sonic is https://github.com/valeriansaliou/sonic — backend search engine; the client lib is what's missing.
